text: There is a playful anticipation in the air, as if the promise of a 'big smile' might burst forth from any moment or interaction. The environment feels oddly dreamlike—the blue glow of the meeting room and the vibrant, text-filled exhibition wall. I feel quietly delighted, on the verge of amusement, yet also introspective among these strange, staged spaces. My presence is both that of witness and participant, invited to share in joy, to notice the layers of performance, and to reflect on what it means to smile in a space curated for observation and discovery. This duality makes me feel suspended between self-consciousness and genuine happiness, hovering expectantly.
